name: The Formless Flame
implicitMods: Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: Armour is increased by Overcapped Fire Resistance
flavourText: Our skin turns to ash
and we are swallowed by his brilliant red light.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain +40% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 16% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: March of the Legion
explicitMods: +5 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 25 Divine Blessing
flavourText: When the time comes to face evil, the faithful are never alone.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants evasion to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1620 additional Evasion Rating
You and nearby allies gain 30% more Evasion rating
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Lightning, Melee, Attack, AoE, Duration, Strike, Aura

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Aura grants 13 to 239 added Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill. Minions, Totems, Traps and Mines cannot gain Inspiration Charges.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 39% less Mana Cost

Gain an Inspiration Charge when you Spend Mana on Upfront
Costs or Effects of Supported Skills
Lose all Inspiration Charges after Spending a total of 800 Mana on Upfront Costs and Effects of Supported Skills
Supported Skills deal 5% more Elemental Damage per Inspiration Charge
Supported Skills have 8% increased Critical Strike Chance per Inspiration Charge
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +3 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Gain 24% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Replica Dreamfeather
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
flavourText: "Once we armoured the test subject heavily enough to test Prototype #502, he proceeded
to fight his way out. I don't know what we expected."
- Researcher Graven

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 10 Life per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 70 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 3272 total Damage from Hits
Supported Skills require 10% reduced amount of Damage taken to Trigger
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3000% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.

name: The Fourth Vow
explicitMods: Armour also applies to Chaos Damage taken from Hits
Physical Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
flavourText: Seek not to avoid the mortal pains of this world.
In flagellation, there lies freedom from temptation.

flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

properties.name: Attack, Projectile, AoE, Melee, Strike, Fire

socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land.
explicitMods: 60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Projectiles deal 50% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 50% more Melee Attack Speed
Supported Skills deal 20% less Attack Damage
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Damage
First Repeat of Supported Skills deals 22% more Damage
Second Repeat of Supported Skills deals 44% more Damage
Third Repeat of Supported Skills deals 66% more Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Strike Skills target 3 additional nearby Enemies
Extra Targets for Supported Skills can be found 40% further away
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "I believe the Halls of the Dead are secretly a
training ground. One day, we will be called
forth to stand and fight against a great tide."

name: Honour Bauble
explicitMods: 2% chance to receive additional Blight items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
6% chance in Heists for Orbs of Augmentation to drop as Chaos Orbs instead
26% chance in Heists for Chromatic Orbs to drop as Jeweller's Orbs instead

name: Foulborn Mageblood

Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
mutatedMods: Rightmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you

name: Dusk Turn
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

descrText: Right click to activate. Only one Tincture in your belt can be active at a time. Mana Burn causes you to lose 1% of your maximum Mana per stack per second. Can be deactivated manually, or will automatically deactivate when you reach 0 Mana.

name: Nimis
explicitMods: Projectiles are fired in random directions
flavourText: Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.

implicitMods: Creates a Smoke Cloud on Use
craftedMods: 54% of Damage from your Hits cannot be Reflected during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maloney's Mechanism

flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

typeLine: Alchemist's Silver Flask of the Impala
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Replica Voideye
flavourText: "So close, yet frustratingly distinct. Something more is going on here..."

explicitMods: Melee Hits from Strike Skills Fortify
flavourText: Forged from the heart of the densest star,
your courage will fail long before it does.
